phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Parliament is open for visits today
phrases.text_local: Le Parlement est-il ouvert aux visites aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh pah-luh-MAN eh-TEEL oo-VEHR oh vee-ZEET oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: The European Parliament offers free visits when not in session. It's best to check online or call ahead.

responses.english: You need to check online. Visits depend on the sessions.
responses.phonetic: eel foh vay-ree-FYAY ahn LEEN-yuh. lay vee-ZEET day-PAHND day seh-SYOHN
responses.french: Il faut vérifier en ligne. Les visites dépendent des sessions.

phrases.cultural_note: Free visits run year-round when Parliament is not in session. Book online. You'll see the hemicycle and committee rooms.

responses.phonetic: wee, may lah ray-zair-vah-SYON ahn leen-yuh eh ploo SIMPL

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the entrance for visitors is
phrases.text_local: Où est l'entrée pour les visiteurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lahn-TRAY poor lay vee-zee-TUHR
phrases.cultural_note: The visitor entrance is separate from the main entrance used by MEPs and staff.

responses.english: The visitor entrance is on the east side, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: lahn-TRAY vee-zee-TUHR eh koh-TAY EST, swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: L'entrée visiteurs est côté est, suivez les panneaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a café or restaurant inside
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un café à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn kah-FAY ah lan-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: The Parliament building has a cafeteria accessible to visitors during tour hours.

responses.english: Yes, there's a cafeteria open to visitors.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah oon kah-fay-tay-RYAH ahk-seh-SEEBL oh vee-zee-TUHR
responses.french: Oui, il y a une cafétéria accessible aux visiteurs.
